Text: The system shall only be in autopilot mode if there is a GPS fix.
Notes: This requirement is not always true or false in principle.

Text: The system shall have a GPS fix if and only if it has a GPS fix.
Notes: This requirement is always true, and therefore doesn't add value. The monitor should never report a violation.

Text: The system shall have a GPS fix if and only if it does not have a GPS fix.
Notes: This requirement is always false, and therefore cannot be realized. The monitor should always report a violation.
